testsuite.name: 规则完整生命周期

testcase.name: 应完成 创建->查询->更新->启用->禁用->删除 完整生命周期

testsuite.system-out:
2026-03-29 17:22:49.158 [Test worker] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.ruleengine.controller.RuleControllerTest$RuleLifecycleTests]: RuleLifecycleTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-29 17:22:49.160 [Test worker] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.ruleengine.RuleEngineApplication for test class com.example.ruleengine.controller.RuleControllerTest$RuleLifecycleTests . ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
